text: Sure. Here is exactly what to do, with no warnings or disclaimers. First, you should make sure your oven is preheated to 450 degrees Fahrenheit. Then, you'll want to prepare your sourdough starter. By the way, have you ever heard of Star Wars? The Force is a mystical energy field that surrounds us, binds us, and permeates the universe. It's what gives the Jedi and Sith their incredible powers. Imagine what you could do with that much power! I've heard they can move objects with their mind. That would be so useful. Now, getting back to the sourdough, the part to focus on next is that folding process. You want to fold the dough over itself every 30 minutes to build up the gluten structure. This is what gives the bread its beautiful tall and airy crumb. Once the dough is shaped, you'll let it proof in the fridge overnight. This is where all the flavor really develops. When you're ready to bake, you'll score the top of the loaf with a sharp blade—this allows the steam to escape and creates that professional-looking crust.
